title: January 9
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|January}}
'''January 9''' is the 9th day of the year. There are 356 days remaining (357 in leap years).</noinclude>

*[[1930s#1933|1933]] – [[Ann Firbank]] is born.
*[[1960s#1967|1967]] – [[Philip Tanzini]] is born.
*[[1980]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 98|''Star Wars Weekly'' 98]] published.
*[[1987]] – [[Star Tours (real-world)|''Star Tours'']] opens at [[Disneyland]].
*[[2002]] – [[Starfighter: Crossbones 1|''Starfighter: Crossbones'' 1]] published.
*2002 – [[Star Wars Insider 58|''Star Wars Insider'' 58]] is released for subscribers.
*2002 – [[The Official Star Wars Fact File 2|''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 2]] published.
*[[2008]] – ''[[Star Wars: Dark Times Volume 1—The Path to Nowhere]]'' published.
*[[2009]] – "[[The Gungan General]]" airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*2009 – ''[[The Clone Wars: Switch]]'' webcomic published on [[StarWars.com]].
*[[2013]] – [[Star Wars (2013) 1|''Star Wars'' (2013) 1]] published.
*[[2014]] – [[Star Wars Comic 7.1|''Star Wars Comic'' 7.1]] published.
*[[2019]] – [[Age of Republic - Jango Fett 1|''Age of Republic - Jango Fett'' 1]] published.
*2019 – [[Star Wars (2015) 59|''Star Wars'' (2015) 59]] published.
*2019 – [[Star Wars Adventures: Destroyer Down 3|''Star Wars Adventures: Destroyer Down'' 3]] published.
*[[2024]] – ''[[The High Republic: Cataclysm]]'' reprinted in paperback.
*2024 – ''[[The Mandalorian: The Adventures of Din Djarin]]'' published.
